RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0003 Page 1 of 4 Statement of Account Transaction Running Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 11/08/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 381 - 8,119 23/11/2025 UTILITY BILL 513 - 7,606 12/07/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 143 668 8,131 04/07/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,918 10,049 24/04/2025 UTILITY BILL 619 - 9,430 14/11/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 499 1,197 10,128 14/03/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 10,128 14/05/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 10,128 14/01/2025 UTILITY BILL 678 275 9,725 01/02/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 581 - 9,144 18/11/2025 UTILITY BILL 415 1,616 10,345 28/07/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 377 1,412 11,380 24/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 11,380 22/04/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 164 866 12,082 08/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 280 12,362 12/05/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 12,362
